title: Amethyst Tools
description: This mod adds Amethyst Tools in a unique and vanilla friendly way.
body:
###
[ 1.19.2 - 1.1.5 ]
This mod adds Amethyst Tools in a unique and vanilla friendly way. Made in [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) --- ## How to make the tools - First you need to make a Rough Amethyst Shard by putting an Amethyst Block in a stone cuter.      - Next take an Iron tool and combine it with and Rough Amethyst Shard in a smithing table.      --- [![Plantminecraft](https://i.ibb.co/XYPhdM2/Plantminecraft-Button.png "Planetminecraft Button")](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/amethyst-tools-5738371/)     [![Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/assets/logo.png "abric Button")](https://fabricmc.net/)
